evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The quote emphasizes developing and maintaining existing data products, framing the role around extending and sustaining current infrastructure rather than building from zero.
evidence.work_arrangement: Hybrid arrangement: three office days weekly in Berlin Kreuzberg
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The JD names Python, dbt, and Airflow as the technical stack with no mention of AI tools, AI-assisted coding, or AI-consuming infrastructure anywhere in the text.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: The JD covers client implementation, team leadership, and coding but never mentions testing tools or frames data quality as an owned testing responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Developing and maintaining data products across public sector domains
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The framing centers on client delivery, operational handover, and team leadership rather than explicit compliance, audit, or regulatory language, despite the sensitive public-sector domain.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: JD emphasizes multi-month implementations, operational handover, and maintaining established products with no velocity signals present.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: While public sector Finance carries inherent compliance risk, the JD uses generic language about developing and maintaining without explicit financial reporting, audit, or regulatory language.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Existing team with 2 direct reports using named tools (Python, dbt, Airflow) in current responsibilities, indicating established but small function.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific technologies, team structure, domain context (public sector), and client implementation methodology provide technical clarity.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Primary responsibilities center on client-facing implementation delivery and customer success partnership, establishing commercial GTM orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role genuinely combines strategic team leadership and direction-setting with hands-on execution and project delivery work.
